title: Crown of Salt - 7 Day Immersion Sample
objective: Demonstrate full daily flow with narrative progression, clues, interactions, puzzle cadence, and immersion-aware personalization.

narrativeProgression.summary: An intake anomaly lands across multiple channels before dawn.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: Shipping manifests arrive by email and WhatsApp with contradictory destination ports.

threadUpdates.update: Manifest Drift: Shipping manifests arrive by email and WhatsApp with contradictory destination ports.
Peripheral signal tied to Brine-sealed manifest remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: Crown of Salt - Day 01 police report
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Brine-sealed manifest.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Crown of Salt ARG artifact Day 01. Type: police_report. Clue focus: Brine-sealed manifest. Location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Crown of Salt police_report audio cue for day 1. Clue anchor: Brine-sealed manifest. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Brine-sealed manifest and tell me if your last call still stands (none).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Brine-sealed manifest.

distraction.title: Red Herring 01
distraction.summary: A polished leak points toward an emotionally satisfying suspect, but timeline math does not support it.
distraction.whyItFeelsPlausible: It references Brine-sealed manifest with convincing formatting and apparent chain-of-custody metadata.
distraction.hiddenFault: Embedded timezone marker is impossible for the claimed capture device, indicating staged fabrication.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

puzzle.title: Day 02 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Dockside CCTV still.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with DOCK.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Next day unlock remains delayed until one additional interaction is logged.
